regression_verified: loop-01's original, unmodified test_parser.py (30 tests) passes against loop-02's parser.py with zero changes required.
known_caveats: Self-judged only (judge.md in each loop); an independent judge (per the parent experiment prompt, gpt-5.6-terra) has not yet reviewed this Track -- objective tests dominate and are already recorded, but maintainability/error_clarity self-scores are provisional.

maintainability capped at 4/5 in loop-02: the per-state handler methods still mutate shared _Machine instance state rather than being pure functions; documented as a possible loop-03/synthesis follow-up, not pursued here because the Track's plan called for exactly two Loops.

Column/line positions are counted per Python str code point (not per UTF-16 code unit or raw UTF-8 byte), which is appropriate given parse() accepts an already-decoded str, but is worth noting for anyone comparing positions against a byte-oriented tool.
This artifact only covers the track-state-machine Track; the sibling line-oriented/regex Track and the cross-Track synthesis are out of scope for this writable subtree.
